resources.title: Introduction to Discrete Mathematics
resources.description: Khan Academy lesson covering the basic concepts and definitions that form the foundation of discrete mathematics.

resources.title: Sets – Introduction and Practice
resources.description: Interactive lessons and exercises on set notation, operations, Venn diagrams, and basic set theory problems.

resources.title: Proofs in Discrete Mathematics
resources.description: Comprehensive guide to proof techniques (direct, contrapositive, contradiction, induction) with examples and checklist items.

resources.title: Relations and Functions
resources.description: Lesson covering definitions, properties, composition, inverses, and quizzes for relations and functions.

resources.title: Relations and Functions – Practice
resources.description: A set of practice problems with step‑by‑step solutions for mastering relations and functions.

resources.title: Introduction to Graph Theory
resources.description: Quiz‑style assessment covering vertices, edges, paths, cycles, and basic graph terminology.

resources.title: Graph Terminology and Types
resources.description: Checklist of key graph concepts (simple, directed, weighted, trees, bipartite) with examples.

resources.title: Fundamentals of Combinatorics
resources.description: Quiz covering counting principles, permutations, combinations, and the pigeonhole principle.

resources.title: Permutations & Combinations Practice
resources.description: A collection of practice problems with detailed solutions for permutations and combinations.

resources.title: Propositional and Predicate Logic
resources.description: Quiz testing understanding of logical connectives, truth tables, quantifiers, and predicate logic.

assignment_resources.assignment_title: Logical Operators and Proof Techniques Checklist

resources.title: Logical Operators & Proof Techniques
resources.description: Checklist summarizing logical operators, equivalences, and common proof strategies.

resources.title: Applications of Discrete Mathematics – MIT OCW
resources.description: MIT OpenCourseWare material describing real‑world applications of discrete math in computer science, networking, and cryptography.

assignment_resources.assignment_title: Review of Discrete Mathematics Concepts Quiz

resources.title: Discrete Mathematics Review Quiz
resources.description: Comprehensive review quiz covering all major topics from the course.

assignment_resources.assignment_title: Practice Problems and Critical Thinking Exercises Checklist

resources.title: Critical Thinking Exercises in Discrete Math
resources.description: Checklist of challenging practice problems designed to develop deeper problem‑solving skills.

resources.title: Final Assessment – Discrete Mathematics
resources.description: Summative assessment covering the entire curriculum, suitable for final grading.
